### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://www.investing.com/currencies/usd-jpy-chart](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.investing.com%2Fcurrencies%2Fusd-jpy-chart) ### Comment > A anti-adblock message is showing with Annoyence list enabled. > > > Tried to disable Annoyence list, and enable only: > - AdGuard Popups filter > - AdGuard Mobile Banners filter > > But then I get the adblock blocker popup AND another popup telling me the ”mobile app is bettter”. So also an issue with the Mobile Banners filter not removing the mobile popup on investing.com? ### Screenshots

AdGuard Base

AdGuard Popups,

labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: NSFW
labels.description: Nudes and porn sites

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
4. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
5. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
6. Tap to install
7. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
8. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

comment.body: I can't reproduce the issue and the background on my phone is also different. However, this site is using Ad-Shield so it might be because of that.

issue.title: titulky.com top menu is broken if AdGuard - Ads filter is enabled in uBlock Origin

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

Other ad blocker

### AdGuard version

uBlock Origin 1.16.6.1 for Pale Moon

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

other (specify in comment below)

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://www.titulky.com/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

If I enable AdGuard - Ads filter in uBlock Origin for Pale Moon then the top menu on website https://www.titulky.com is broken.
The url for the AdGuard - Ads filter is there this: https://filters.adtidy.org/extension/ublock/filters/2_without_easylist.txt
And says on top:
! Title: AdGuard Base filter
! Description: This filter is necessary for quality ad blocking.
! Version: 2.4.43.95
! TimeUpdated: 2026-02-01T06:22:15+00:00
! Expires: 5 days (update frequency)
! Homepage: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardFilters

Here are the screenshots.

With the mentioned filter disabled it is correct:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/152c489a-0f1b-4b10-b5e3-bdcd30da2f54)

With the mentioned filter enabled it is broken:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c3432ed1-81f0-4d32-96d8-2980e3502cb2)

Browser version Pale Moon 34.0.1 x64


### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
@BlazDT Hi, it's from this commit: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/commit/ed97e03968

I don't know how the old issue looks like so I'm disabling the rule at the moment.

На скрине сбоку блок рекламы, который нужно убирать вручную, причем это действует +- сутки, через это время блок будет отображаться как ни в чем не бывало. Также появляется блок рекламы сверху (на скрине под панелью закладок в браузере) работает по тому же принципу что и боковой, но иногда не воспроизводится ### Screenshots

### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://mail.yandex.ru](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmail.yandex.ru) ### Comment > Проблему воспроизвести элементарно, на скрине страница в яндекс почте. На скрине сбоку блок рекламы, который нужно убирать вручную, причем это действует +- сутки, через это время блок будет отображаться как ни в чем не бывало. Также появляется блок рекламы сверху (на скрине под панелью закладок в браузере) работает по тому же принципу что и боковой, но иногда не воспроизводится ### Screenshots

issue.title: titulky.com top menu is broken if AdGuard - Ads filter is enabled in uBlock Origin

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

Other ad blocker

### AdGuard version

uBlock Origin 1.16.6.1 for Pale Moon

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

other (specify in comment below)

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

https://www.titulky.com/

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

_No response_

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

If I enable AdGuard - Ads filter in uBlock Origin for Pale Moon then the top menu on website https://www.titulky.com is broken.
The url for the AdGuard - Ads filter is there this: https://filters.adtidy.org/extension/ublock/filters/2_without_easylist.txt
And says on top:
! Title: AdGuard Base filter
! Description: This filter is necessary for quality ad blocking.
! Version: 2.4.43.95
! TimeUpdated: 2026-02-01T06:22:15+00:00
! Expires: 5 days (update frequency)
! Homepage: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardFilters

Here are the screenshots.

With the mentioned filter disabled it is correct:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/152c489a-0f1b-4b10-b5e3-bdcd30da2f54)

With the mentioned filter enabled it is broken:

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c3432ed1-81f0-4d32-96d8-2980e3502cb2)

Browser version Pale Moon 34.0.1 x64


### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body: Cannot remember old issue, but if it looks fine with disabled rule, OK.
